fields.description:
We believe conversations will become the #1 way to shop.

At Gorgias, we’re building the platform that makes this real: a unified AI agent that sells, supports, and re-engages customers across the entire journey. Conversational Commerce is the future of ecommerce, and we’re leading that shift.

Our mission is to turn every interaction between a brand and its customers into a relationship: personal, seamless, and intelligent. By combining deep product expertise with the latest in AI, we’re making shopping feel more natural, human, and connected than ever before.

To win, we focus relentlessly on:

 - Quality: conversations that feel authentic and on-brand.

 - Experience: effortless shopping from chat to checkout.

 - Re-engagement: personal, 1-1 dialogue instead of noisy marketing.

The opportunity is massive. As AI reshapes how people buy, Gorgias is building the foundation for the next decade of ecommerce, where every brand has its own intelligent agent and every customer feels understood.

Join us to make Conversational Commerce real.


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a strong, execution focused Recruiter to own end to end hiring across multiple functions at Gorgias.

You will manage active searches across a mix of business and operational roles, partnering closely with hiring managers to deliver high quality hires within clear timelines.

You may also support more senior recruiters and the Head of Talent Acquisition on technical or leadership searches through research, talent mapping, and candidate shortlisting.

This is a high ownership role for the searches you directly own, while also contributing to broader team hiring efforts.

You will thrive here if you enjoy fast paced environments, structured processes, and being accountable for outcomes, not just activity.


MISSION

Own and deliver high quality hiring across assigned functions, ensuring searches move with speed, structure, and strong candidate experience, while contributing to a high performance Talent Acquisition culture at Gorgias.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own 5 to 10 concurrent roles end to end, from intake to offer close

 - Run structured intake meetings to align on success profiles and sourcing strategy

 - Drive sourcing across LinkedIn, referrals, inbound, and creative outbound when needed

 - Run structured, high signal phone screens tied to defined competencies

 - Partner closely with hiring managers to ensure alignment, feedback quality, and efficient decision making

 - Contribute to technical or leadership searches through research, talent mapping, and shortlisting support when needed

 - Keep pipelines clean and up to date in Ashby

 - Proactively identify bottlenecks and course correct without waiting to be told

 - Lead offer processes and drive high offer acceptance rates

 - Contribute to continuous improvement of our hiring process and metrics dashboard


HOW WE MEASURE SUCCESS

 - Time to fill and time to first qualified candidate

 - Quality and consistency of candidate pipelines

 - Offer acceptance rate

 - Hiring manager satisfaction

 - Quality of hire, assessed through early performance feedback

 - Data hygiene and process discipline in our ATS

This is a role where outcomes matter. We care about quality, speed, and candidate experience equally.


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 2 to 4 years of recruiting experience

 - Experience in agency or in house within a fast paced tech or scale up environment

 - Proven track record of closing roles under time constraints without compromising on quality

 - Strong judgment, you can distinguish between signal and noise in a candidate profile

 - You understand the difference between perception and perspective, you seek context before forming conclusions

 - Naturally driven and self motivated, you take ownership without needing reminders

 - Comfortable being accountable for results

 - Confident partnering with and constructively challenging hiring managers when needed

 - Experience using an ATS, ideally Ashby or a similar structured system


TEAM AND CULTURE

You will join a small, high accountability Talent team that values structure, transparency, and continuous improvement.

We are looking for someone who:

 - Has low ego and high ownership

 - Is open to feedback and excited to grow under experienced recruiters

 - Brings energy and consistency to the team

 - Cares deeply about candidate experience

 - Values clarity, metrics, and process discipline

This is not a passive coordination role. It is a builder role for someone who wants to master the craft of recruiting in a high performance environment.


WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU

 - Mentorship from experienced recruiters who care deeply about craft

 - Exposure to hiring across multiple functions and levels

 - Real ownership and autonomy early on

 - Clear performance metrics and growth path

 - Competitive compensation and benefits

 - Hybrid setup, 2 days per week in our Paris office
   

Perks and Benefits

 - 🏖️ 5-week vacation plus 2 weeks RTT (We follow each country's appropriate PTO Laws)

 - 🤕 Paid sick leave

 - 🧸 Paid parental leave (16 weeks)

 - 💻 MacBook Air

 - 🍽️ Personal credit card to buy lunches (we use Swile https://www.swile.co/en-FR)

 - 🏥 We provide private health insurance (we use GAN)

 - 💆🏻‍♀️ Get up to €700 to set up your workstation at home (working from home should feel breezy)

 - 📚 Get up to €2000 of learning material and wellness support per year! This includes €1500 for learning material (such as books, courses, and individual coaching sessions) directly linked to your job scope, as well as a €500 wellness budget. Take advantage of these resources to grow in your role and prioritize your personal development and wellness.

 - 🥰 Every quarter, we organize an online company-wide summit to discuss where we’re going and strengthen social bonds. Once per year we organize offsite team retreats and company retreats!
   

AI at Gorgias
At Gorgias, AI is a natural extension of how we work and build. Our teams use it every day to research, write, analyze, code, and craft better customer experiences. Everyone has access to premium AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Granola & others) and an annual L&D budget to explore new ones.

The real magic happens when we share what we learn. Our #powerup Slack channel is a digital petri dish of new tools and workflows, and each team has AI champions who showcase fresh ideas during weekly company-wide standups, now practically AI demo sessions.

We see AI not as a replacement for creativity or empathy, but as a multiplier, helping us move faster, think deeper, and serve customers better.

AI use in Recruiting at Gorgias
By submitting your application, you agree that Gorgias may collect and process your personal data for recruiting, workforce planning, and related purposes. For more information about how we process your data and your rights, please refer to our Applicant Privacy Policy https://www.gorgias.com/legal/applicant-privacy-policy.

Diversity & Inclusion at Gorgias
We’re committed to creating an inclusive environment where everyone can thrive. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives because diverse teams drive innovation and better decision-making.

If you need accommodations during the application or interview process, please contact us at accommodation@gorgias.com.
fields.title: Recruiter
